title: Enter Sandworm
description: Massive Dune-inspired sandworms lie in wait...
body:
## Support Me

[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@L33Tyt) [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png)](https://discord.com/invite/WjmZaDTFpn) [![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png)](https://x.com/L33tfx)

## Bugs Notice

This mod currently has some bugs (with sandworms not despawning), since it was mainly made for a Youtube video. 

**Please don't use the mod for a world that doesn't have commands enabled**, since you may need to use the following commands to clean up an old sandworm entity if it didn't despawn properly: 

- /kill @e[type=entersandworm:soulsandworm]
- /kill @e[type=entersandworm:soulsandwormbody]
- /kill @e[type=entersandworm:soulsandwormhead] 

## Information

this is a fabric mod for 1.21/1.21.1 that adds sandworms to Minecraft, inspired by Dune. they can be enabled for soul sand valleys in the nether and/or deserts in the overworld through the config. soul sandworms are spawned in when a player breaks a soul sand block (in a soul sand valley) or sand block (in a desert) twice in under 90 seconds. 

the mod can be used on neoforge or forge using sinytra connector.

<details>
<summary>Gameplay Details</summary>
a sandworm is extremely powerful and able to "eat" and kill you instantly if you collide with its head. 
  
the best method to kill them is to use explosives to blow up their head. upon death, they will drop a tooth item which can be used alongside a netherite ingot and a stick to craft a Crysknife: a sword more powerful than a netherite sword.

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f151ab1e3f23448025ec92c8161134eae2c84358_0.webp)

</details>


## Dependencies

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Required)

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional, but recommended for easier config access)

## Config

The mod has a serverside config to change whether sandworms spawn in soul sand valleys, sandworms spawn in deserts, their health, the damage their "bite" does, and the damage colliding with their body does.

## Public Usage

if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this mod in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video.

*   **as long as you credit me,** you may use this mod or assets from this mod in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports
*   **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this mod or assets from this mod.
*   **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
